description.en: The set of all exceptions (as a tuple) that methods of FTP instances may raise as a result of problems with the FTP connection (as opposed to programming errors made by the caller). This set includes the four exceptions listed above as well as OSError and EOFError.

description.en: Abort a file transfer that is in progress. Using this does not always work, but it’s worth a try.

excerpt.es: Abort a file transfer that is in progress. Using this does not always work, but it’s worth a try.
excerpt.en: Abort a file transfer that is in progress. Using this does not always work, but it’s worth a try.

description.en: Set up a secure control connection by using TLS or SSL, depending on what is specified in the ssl_version attribute. Changed in version 3.4: The method now supports hostname check with ssl.SSLContext.check_hostname and Server Name Indication (see ssl.HAS_SNI).
